title: Mystic SMP
description: Mystic. A land of awe and wonder. At least... it was... until evil seeped in through cracks in reality. Go forth, Adventurers.
body:
Mystic. A land of awe and wonder. At least... it was... until evil seeped in through cracks in reality. Go forth, Adventurers.

**Mystic SMP** is the modpack we use to play on the Mystic SMP! Come watch us play, ask to join on our Discord, or even create your own server!

Reveal trailer coming soon.

# Note for older computers:

Shaders are on by default. This is a BUG and will be fixed soon. The pack is designed to be easy to run, but capable of being a high end experience too. Please disable shaders in game by pressing `k` or by doing so in the shader packs menu if you need them turned off.

# Important Credits
[UltimaCraft by GrandMagus](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ultimacraft-main)

[Bliss Shaders by X0nk (Chocapic13' Shaders edit)](https://modrinth.com/shader/bliss-shader)

All Mods, Resource Packs, and Shader Packs included in this modpack are property of their respective creators.

The Mystic logo and custom resources for Mystic are provided by [burkejasonj](https://captnjason.com/).

**Note for Mod Developers and Pack Creators:**

If you would like your mods/packs removed from the modpack, please contact me ASAP at [contact@captnjason.com](mailto:contact@captnjason.com) and I will make sure to remove them. Otherwise, expect full attribution where possible. On behalf of the Mystic SMP, thank you for your contributions to the Minecraft community and our little server.

# Excerpt from "Mystic SMP Opening Script"
Mystic. A land of awe and wonder. At least... it was... until evil seeped in through cracks in reality, later known as "Nether Portals." The portals were opened by adventurers from all over the land. They sought to tame the desolate wasteland for their own personal gain. An entity as old as the land itself, known as "The Wizard," used his mastery of magic to control these opened portals and prevent the spread of this evil back into our world. Soon, otherworldly beings would enter through these portals, causing chaos and destruction wherever they set foot. "The Wizard" lost control over the portals, which allowed the spread of evil into our world.

This evil overran the world with spiked valleys of netherrack and lava seas. People and children alike began dying in the harsh conditions. I couldn't change what was unleashed upon the world I made. It became but a shadow of its former self. "The Wizard" used his remaining reserves of magic to send the evil back into the seams of reality. His plan failed, creating a far worse darkness that would deprive him of the magic he used to fight it.

The land was all but lifeless. A fierce band of heroes, together with "The Wizard," set out to tame and subdue this darkness. These heroes fought valiantly as they worked together to enact a plan that would seal away the darkness for good. Fortified strongholds were constructed, and housed portals capable of holding this new darkness. One final battle sent the darkness back into these "End Portals" and successfully entrapped the evil in a dimension of its own. The focusing crystals, or eyes, were destroyed in pits of superheated lava. This final destructive act ensured no one could dare to release this evil back into the world.

For years, the world celebrated the victory. These Heroes of Mystic would become the stuff of legend and myth. As time went on, the world settled into this idea of peace. Our heroes became nothing more than bedtime stories told to the village children. "The Wizard" held onto the old ways of life, receding into a newly constructed tower of his own design. He sought to regain control of the magic he once wielded. Nothing stopped him from the idea that one day the evil would return.
Your arrival in lands unfamiliar to you leads me to believe that "The Wizard" may be right. This evil, this darkness, may be returning to our lands, and I fear that even I won't be able to stop it. Go forth, Adventurers. My world no longer has the luxury of waiting. Wake up.

**Script written by [burkejasonj](https://captnjason.com/).**
**Story idea and major creative input by [TessaOdessa7](https://www.twitch.tv/tessaodessa7)**.
